name: AccountId
description: The identifier of the customer account for this case or work order.

name: ActualReceivedPON
description: The purchase order number on the received RMA shipment.

name: ActualReceivedSerialNumber
description: The serial number on the received RMA hardware.

name: AssetId
description: The identifier of the network asset linked to this work order or line item.

name: AssignedTime
description: The date and time the service appointment was assigned to an engineer.

name: Case
description: The case name or reference linked to this RMA line item.

name: CaseId
description: The identifier of the case linked to this RMA line item or work order.

name: City
description: The city where the work order or line item service is located.

name: ContactEmail
description: The email address of the customer contact on the case.

name: ContactId
description: The identifier of the customer contact on the case or work order.

name: ContactPhone
description: The phone number of the customer contact on the case.

name: Country
description: The country where the work order or line item service is located.

name: CustomerAlternateEmail
description: The alternate email for the RMA line item customer.

name: CustomerEmail
description: The primary email of the RMA line item customer.

name: DateReceivedFromCustomer
description: The date RMA hardware was received from the customer.

name: DateShipToCustomer
description: The date RMA hardware was shipped back to the customer.

name: Discount
description: The discount applied to the work order or work order line item.

name: DispatchedTime
description: The date and time the field engineer was dispatched.

name: Duration
description: The duration of the work order or line item.

name: DurationType
description: The unit of measurement for duration, such as hours or days.

name: EndDate
description: The end date of the work order or work order line item.

name: EngineerEmail
description: The email of the field engineer on the service appointment.

name: EngineerName
description: The name of the field engineer on the case or service appointment.

name: EngineerPhone
description: The phone number of the field engineer.

name: ExpectedShipDate
description: The expected date for RMA hardware to be shipped.

name: FLMOnTime
description: Whether first level maintenance was completed within SLA.

name: FMARequested
description: Whether a failure mode analysis was requested.

name: FailureMode
description: The identified hardware failure mode or root cause category.

name: GrandTotal
description: The grand total monetary value of the work order.

name: HRRType
description: The type of hardware return request for this RMA line item.

name: IsClosed
description: Whether this case, work order, or line item has been closed.

name: IsEscalated
description: Whether this case has been escalated.

name: LineItemCount
description: The number of line items in the work order.

name: LineItemNumber
description: The line item reference number within the work order.

name: Name
description: The name or record identifier of the RMA line item or service appointment.

name: OnSiteArrivalTime
description: The date and time the engineer arrived on site.

name: OnSiteDepartTime
description: The date and time the engineer departed the site.

name: OrderId
description: The identifier of the order for this work order line item.

name: Origin
description: The channel through which the case was created.

name: ParentId
description: The identifier of the parent case.

name: Product2Id
description: The identifier of the product on the work order line item.

name: Quantity
description: The quantity of items on the work order line item.

name: Reason
description: The reason the case was created or the root cause.

name: RequestedStartTime
description: The customer requested start time for the service.

name: SLAFailureReason
description: The reason the SLA was not met.

name: SLAStatus
description: The SLA compliance status of the service appointment.

name: StartDate
description: The start date of the work order or line item.

name: StatusCategory
description: The high-level status grouping of the record.

name: Street
description: The street address where the service is located.

name: Subject
description: The subject line or brief summary of the case, work order, or line item.

name: Subtotal
description: The subtotal value of the work order before discounts.

name: TimeOnSite
description: The total time in hours the engineer spent on site.

name: TotalPrice
description: The total price of the work order line item.

name: Type
description: The classification type of the case.

name: UnitPrice
description: The price per unit for the work order line item.

name: WorkOrder
description: The work order reference linked to this service appointment.

name: WorkOrderId
description: The identifier of the work order this line item belongs to.

name: WorkOrderNumber
description: The work order reference number.

name: RecordTypeId
description: The identifier of the record type.

name: ActualRecievedSerialNumber
description: The serial number recorded on receipt of hardware.

name: AssetSerialNumber
description: The serial number of the network asset.

name: CountryofIssue
description: The country where the case issue was reported.

name: CustomerReference
description: The customer reference number for this case or work order.

name: EndCustomer
description: The end customer or final recipient of the service.

name: NetworkImpact
description: The impact level of the issue on the customer network.

name: ProductId
description: The identifier of the product linked to this case or RMA line item.

name: ProductRelease
description: The product software release version for this case.
